emails.subject: Transport capacity deal 810054
emails.body: Transport capacity deal 810054 The ENA counterparty on deal 810054 needs to be changed from ENA IM ME TCO to ENA IM EAST TP1. Please change it or unvalidate it and I will change it. thanks
